svg.title: Line chart of monthly electricity consumption and stacked area chart of consumption by source
svg.desc: Top: line chart of total monthly electricity consumption over 24 months across two years, showing a clear seasonal cycle that peaks each January and rises year over year. Bottom: stacked area chart of the same totals decomposed into three sources — renewables, natural gas, and coal — showing the renewables band growing from about 18 to 30 units while the coal band shrinks.
svg.text: Continuous slope reveals seasonal cycle and year-over-year growth
Same total — composition by source (stacked area)
Filled area = total volume; bands show shifting source mix
